nasb.text: Now King David was old, advanced in age; and they covered him with clothes, but he could not keep warm.

esv.text: Now King David was old and advanced in years. And although they covered him with clothes, he could not get warm.

cnv.text: 大衛王老了，年事已高，他們雖用許多衣服蓋著他，他仍不感到暖和。

ccb.text: 大卫王年纪老迈，虽然盖了几层被子，仍然觉得冷。
